generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor feedback sensor providing current and torque data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing real-time steering position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 for intra-component communication"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle state data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance MotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorFeedbackSensor
    base:desc "Motor feedback data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted via ROS2"
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from physical sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor feedback data including current and torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs point cloud clustering and tracking on raw LiDAR data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for cross-system communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via UI with data reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, ObjectTracks
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC processing tasks (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation commands) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetected, SafeSpeedCalculated, ActuationCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system including enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SpeedAdjustment, EmergencyBrake
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current trajectory"
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected and tracked objects in the environment"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected lead vehicle in the path for ACC system"
]

instance SafeSpeedCalculated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated safe speed for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust target speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust vehicle speed or apply brakes for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity component hosting Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functionality; deployed on separate hardware as ROS2 package"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity component; deployed on separate hardware as ROS2 package"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity component for operator and developer interaction; deployed on separate hardware as ROS2 package"
]

instance VehicleHardwareEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
    base:desc "Hardware environment for the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with three hierarchical entities"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Controlling FE are processed by the Data Translation component for serialization and message alignment, then transmitted over ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity communication to physical actuators including Motor and Steering Servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Devices require 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages; entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) organized by entity-based structure with each deployed on distinct hardware, though Physical Twin Entity extends beyond standard OME to include general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard for Digital twin framework for manufacturing, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Functional Entities responsible for tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing."
]
